title: Antler Luggage Tags - Durable Rubber, for Suitcases & Travel Bags, Assorted Colors, Easy ID & Personalization, Fits Most Suitcases - 1.5 x 10.5 in - Moorland Pink
features: PERSONALIZE YOUR LUGGAGE - Add a touch of style and identity to your travel bags and suitcases with our durable rubber luggage tags.
BUILT TO LAST - Made from strong, high-quality rubber for long-lasting use and reliable performance throughout all your journeys.
BOLD COLORS - Available in a variety of eye-catching colors, perfect for color-matching or contrasting with your Antler suitcase. Perfect to pair with the Antler Luggage Strap for coordinated travel.
TRAVEL GIFT - Ideal for frequent flyers, these tags make thoughtful and practical gifts; measures 1.5 x 10.5 in to fit most luggage handles with ease.

HERITAGE BRAND - The British Travel Brand. Since 1914. For 110 years, Antler has been a constant companion to the world’s most curious explorers. Our British-designed cases, bags and accessories are rigorously tested to meet the needs of modern travel.
description: Tailor your luggage to your travel style with Antler accessories - because in every journey, the little things matter. Crafted from strong and durable rubber, these luggage tags are the perfect way to personalize your travel goods. Our luggage tags come in a variety of colors, making the perfect gift for those who travel often. Complementing all our suitcases, you can effortlessly contrast or colour-match your tag with your bag for a cohesive and confident travel ensemble. Measures: 1.5 x 10.5 in.
